title: FocusMR at NeurIPS 2025
excerpt: Martin Meinel shared a NeurIPS 2025 workshop presentation on FocusMR, an attention-based single-cell Mendelian randomisation framework designed to pinpoint gene-specific, disease-relevant cell subgroups. The work aims to improve disease understanding and refine early therapeutic target discovery. Michael Menden is listed among the co-authors together with Jan Engelmann, Theofanis Karaletsos, and Francesco Paolo Casale.
